case_title: NISSAN MOTOR ACCEPTANCE CORP., A CALIF CORP vs. CAREY, AMANDA et al

docket_entries.description: CONTRACT/WARRANTY, COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF NISSAN MOTOR ACCEPTANCE CORP., A CALIF CORP AS TO DEFENDANT CAREY, AMANDA DOES 1 THROUGH 20, INCLUSIVE SUMMONS ISSUED STATUS CONFERENCE SCHEDULED FOR          JUN-03-1996 PROOF OF SERVICE DUE ON                  APR-02-1996 STATUS CONFERENCE STATEMENT DUE ON       MAY-14-1996

WRIT OF POSSESSION FOR PERSONAL PROPERTY ISSUED TO SF CO; RETURNED UNSATISFIED.

CAUSE CALLED, THE COURT ORDERED THAT PLAINTIFF NISSAN MOTOR ACCEPTANCE CORP., A CALIF CORP HAVE AND RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT CAREY, AMANDA POSSESSION OF THE FOLLOWING DESCRIBED PROPERTY, TO WIT: 1995 NISSAN PICKUP TRUCK, VIN # 1N6SD16SC332458, OR IN CASE A DELIVERY OF SAID PROPERTY TO PLAINTIFF CANNOT BE HAD, THEN THAT THE PLAINTIFF HAVE AND RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT $11,075.00, THE VALUE OF SAID PROPERTY, $1,061.29 DAMAGES, $1,975.00 ATTORNEY FEES, $222.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $3,258.29, PLUS BALANCE OWING ON THE CONTRACT OF $16425.25, TO BE CREDITED WHEN PROPERTY OR VALUE THEREOF IS RECOVERED.
